---
title: "Whitepapers"
subtitle: "Externally releasable deep-dives on UIAO governance topics"
doc-type: section-landing
audience: "Federal CIO/CISO · assessors · research audience"
canon-source: "src/uiao/canon/"
derived-from: "uiao canon"
---

# Whitepapers {.unnumbered}

Long-form synthesis across multiple canon anchors. Whitepapers are the
most heavyweight customer artifact: they cite the Executive Briefs and
Architecture Series rather than re-deriving foundational material. Every
whitepaper is ATO-package-ready and exportable as PDF/DOCX/EPUB.

## Status conventions

Each entry in the table below carries a status badge derived from the
target document's frontmatter, surfaced here so readers know what they
are looking at before opening it:

- **Active** — content describes a program or capability in routine
  operational use against the current canon; the prose has been
  validated against at least one reference deployment.
- **Draft** — content is canonical (governed by the canon-change
  protocol) but the program or capability described is still being
  designed, piloted, or validated. Safe to reference; subject to
  refinement.
- **Aspirational** — the page additionally carries `aspirational: true`
  in frontmatter; a richer callout appears at the top of the page when
  it is opened. Adoption guidance applies as in the page banner.

Adoption state for the substrate as a whole is tracked on the
[Substrate Status](../../docs/substrate-status.qmd) page.

## Pages in this section

| Slug | Topic | Status | Canon anchor |
|---|---|---|---|
| [`uiao-governance-os-whitepaper`](uiao-governance-os-whitepaper.qmd) | The UIAO Governance OS | Active | substrate manifest + unified architecture |
| [`zero-trust-governance-whitepaper`](zero-trust-governance-whitepaper.qmd) | Zero-trust governance pattern | Active | ADR-008 + ZT overview brief |
| [`modernization-governance-whitepaper`](modernization-governance-whitepaper.qmd) | Governance through modernization | Active | Program Vision + Modernization Timeline |
| [`ad-to-entraid-migration-problem`](ad-to-entraid-migration-problem.qmd) | AD-to-Entra ID structural migration problem | Active | `inbox/Posted/AD to EntraID - The Structural Migration Problem.docx` |
| [`aodim-executive-whitepaper`](aodim-executive-whitepaper.qmd) | AODIM — attribute-oriented directory & identity model | Active | `inbox/Posted/AODIM_Executive_Whitepaper.docx` |
| [`uiao-vs-native-tools`](uiao-vs-native-tools.qmd) | UIAO vs Microsoft native tools — AD assessment & modernization gap analysis | Active | `inbox/Posted/UIAO vs Microsoft Native Tools — AD Assessment and Modernization Gap Analysis.docx` |
| [`scubagear-integration-whitepaper`](scubagear-integration-whitepaper.qmd) | SCuBAGear substrate integration | Active | `src/uiao/canon/adapter-registry.yaml#scubagear` |
| [`federal-ssot-alignment`](federal-ssot-alignment.qmd) | Federal SSOT mandate alignment over the identity layer | Active | `UIAO_007` + directory-migration README + drift standard |
| [`federal-hrit-productization`](federal-hrit-productization.qmd) | Federal HRIT productization — inbound HR provisioning into Entra ID under Spec 2 | Active | `Spec2-D6.1` + UIAO_136 family + ADR-003 / ADR-051 / ADR-052 / ADR-053 / ADR-054 / ADR-058 |
| [`git-server-interfaces-whitepaper`](git-server-interfaces-whitepaper.qmd) | UIAO Git server interfaces once deployed on Windows Server 2025 | Active | ADR-041 + `platform-server-v1.2.yaml` + `platform-server-build.qmd` v1.3 + `uiao-git-server` adapter |
